summary:
The test passed after the fix. The issue was that the server acknowledged writes to clients before durably syncing them to disk via fsync. This led to data loss on simulated crashes.  

Fixed by calling `s.wal.Sync()` synchronously after each `Append` in the `SET` handler (tradeoff: higher latency per write, but now provides strict durability).  

Also tweaked `test.sh` to avoid false-failures from the "LOST" summary text when no keys are actually lost.
